name: Aster INU
description: 🚀 ASTER INU – Where memes meet the multichain future 🌌 ASTER INU isn’t just another meme coin—it’s the cosmic pupper on a mission! Inspired by Aster’s dream of seamless cross-chain connectivity, this Inu blends serious crypto utility with the chaotic joy of meme culture. Think of it as: ✨ The wagmi energy of DOGE 🌐 The connectivity of Aster 😂 The meme magic of the internet We’re building a community-first galaxy, where holders are not just investors—they’re explorers, jokers, and culture shapers. Whether you’re here for the memes, the vibes, or the vision of a chain-connected future, ASTER INU has a seat for you on this rocketship. 🚀🐶
